subcodes.first_line: O My Name, Beauty! Upon thee rest My glory and My care! Thy missives and petitions, both past and present, have reached the hearing of this Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی جمال علیک بهائی و عنایتی نامها و عرایضت از قبل و بعد باصغای مظلوم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for protection
